ticket.subject: Re: API integration
ticket.description:
Hi Priya, 

Thank you for sharing the details. The shipper was not aware that this is a paid solution. 

Hi Rinku, 

As discussed over the phone, I’ve scheduled the meeting for today at 5:45 PM to complete the integration. During the session, we will also walk you through the charges and the automation features, which will help streamline and speed up your shipping process.

Meeting link: https://meet.google.com/cog-yawj-zoz

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn <https://www.linkedin.com/company/Pluginhive>
